summary: Iteration 30: SeniorClub Partner Feature - Backend 100% PASS (8/8 tests), Frontend 100% PASS. All new features working correctly.

backend_api_tests: POST /api/partners/leads - creates lead with all fields (name, email, phone, contact_type, plan_interest)
POST /api/partners/leads - creates lead with only required fields
POST /api/partners/leads - returns 422 validation error for missing required field
GET /api/partners/leads - returns all leads as list
GET /api/partners/leads - leads sorted by created_at DESC (newest first)
GET /api/partners/leads/stats - returns lead counts by partner
Create → GET persistence verified - lead appears in list after creation
frontend_ui_tests: Help Rescate card displays logo, description, 'Destacado' badge
Plan Rescate Total preview shows price $32.152/mes
/convenio/help-rescate page loads with hero, services, plans
Services: 'Mejoramiento del Hogar' and 'Emergencias y Traslados' sections
Contact buttons: main (data-testid='contact-help-btn'), Plan Hogar, Plan Rescate
Contact modal opens with Nombre, Correo, Teléfono (+56 prefix), Tipo de contacto fields
Form submission sends lead to backend and shows 'Mensaje enviado' success toast
Admin panel /admin loads with Leads tab (data-testid='tab-leads')
Leads tab shows table with columns: Fecha, Nombre, Email, Teléfono, Convenio, Plan, Tipo
Leads table displays 6 leads with 'help-rescate' partner badges
Blog admin CRUD still working (6 articles, edit/delete buttons visible)

seed_data_creation: Created 5 test leads during testing (TEST_Lead_*, TEST_Persistence_*, TEST_Minimal_*, UI Test User, Test Lead 2). 1 pre-existing test lead (Test User) was already in database.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 30 - SeniorClub Partner Feature testing completed. Key findings: 1) Backend APIs fully functional - POST /api/partners/leads creates leads, GET returns sorted list (newest first), supports partner_slug filtering. 2) Frontend: Homepage SeniorClub section shows Help Rescate partner card with logo, plans, buttons. /convenio/help-rescate page has full partner details with contact modal. Contact form submits to backend API successfully. 3) Admin panel has new 'Leads' tab showing partner leads in table format. 4) Blog admin CRUD remains functional (regression passed). 5) Key data-testids: senior-club-section, view-help-rescate, contact-help-rescate-home, contact-help-btn, partner-contact-modal, lead-name/email/phone/contact-type/submit, tab-leads, leads-tab.

api_endpoints.description: List all leads (sorted DESC by date)
